title: Warszewiczia coccinea
taxonomy: Warszewiczia coccinea is a genus of flowering plants in the family Gentianaceae. It is a monotypic genus, consisting of only one species. The species is endemic to the Andes mountain range in South America, specifically in Bolivia, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela. Warszewiczia coccinea is classified as a flowering plant that belongs to the order Gentianales and the clade Asterids. It is a unique species within the family Gentianaceae, known for its vibrant colors and distinctive flowers.
